title: Floral Dense Saudia Strawberries Stir-fry
description: A floral and dense one-pot dish featuring strawberries simmered with aromatic spices for a sugar-free Arabian delight.
instructions: Wash strawberries and remove any leaves or stems.
In a small bowl, mix rice vinegar, sugar-free ketchup, cinnamon powder, salt, and water to create the sauce. Stir well until all ingredients are dissolved.
Heat up a pan over medium heat. Add olive oil if desired (optional).
Add strawberries into the pan, tossing them gently with the sauce mixture for about 5 minutes or until they start to soften and slightly brown on the edges.
Remove from heat once they reach your preferred level of doneness and seasoning. Garnish with fresh mint leaves before serving.
Serve immediately as a dessert or as an accompaniment to any meal.
